triage.primary_complaint: Fire alarm going off with visible flames and smoke.
callback_questions: What is the status of PFC Daniels?
Are there any hazardous materials involved?

CALL-001.cad_brief:
INCIDENT SUMMARY  
Fire alarm activated at Hangar 7, Flight Line East. Visible flames and smoke reported near JP-8 cart on the west side. Two Marines evacuated; one (PFC Daniels) unaccounted for in the avionics bay. 

UNIT ASSIGNMENT RECOMMENDATION  
Dispatch 2 engine units and 1 rescue unit to the scene. 

SCENE SAFETY BRIEF  
Ensure all personnel maintain a safe distance from the building. Assess for hazardous materials due to proximity to JP-8. Confirm evacuation of all personnel before entry.

triage.primary_complaint: Two trucks involved in a wreck, one rolled over with a driver not moving.
callback_questions: Is the driver of the rolled truck conscious?
Are there any other vehicles involved?
Is there any fire or smoke visible?

CALL-002.cad_brief:
INCIDENT SUMMARY:  
MVI at Perimeter Road, MM 4.2. Two trucks involved: one green Humvee and one civilian Tacoma on its side. Driver of Tacoma not moving; Humvee driver walking but injured. Fuel smell reported, no visible fire.

UNIT ASSIGNMENT RECOMMENDATION:  
Dispatch 1 ambulance, 1 fire engine, and 1 police unit to the scene.

SCENE SAFETY BRIEF:  
Approach with caution due to potential fuel leak. Maintain a 50-foot perimeter from the wreckage. Assess for additional hazards upon arrival.

triage.primary_complaint: House on fire with possible occupants inside
callback_questions: Are there any visible flames or smoke?
Can you see if anyone is attempting to exit the house?
Is there a safe distance you can maintain from the fire?

CALL-003.cad_brief:
INCIDENT SUMMARY  
Structure fire at 4419 Magnolia Loop, Base Housing. Caller reports the back of the house is fully involved, flames visible through the roof. Possible occupants inside: Henderson family with two children. Caller is in a safe location across the street.

UNIT ASSIGNMENT RECOMMENDATION  
Dispatching 2 fire engines and 1 rescue unit to the scene.  

SCENE SAFETY BRIEF  
Ensure a safe perimeter around the structure. Confirm no occupants have exited. Assess for potential hazards including downed power lines and propane tanks. Approach from a safe distance.

callback_questions: Is the area secure for responders?
What is the status of the range medic?

CALL-004.cad_brief:
INCIDENT SUMMARY:  
MASCAL reported at Range Complex Bravo, Live-Fire Lane 3. Mortar mishap with 6 casualties; 3 conscious and screaming, 3 unresponsive. Range medic on scene initiating triage. Area is cold, ceasefire in effect, EOD notified.

UNIT ASSIGNMENT RECOMMENDATION:  
- 3 ambulances  
- 1 helicopter for evac of 2 critical patients (head and chest trauma)  
- 1 duty surgeon team  

SCENE SAFETY BRIEF:  
Confirm area is secure before entry. Monitor for any unexploded ordnance. Coordinate with range medic for triage updates. Prioritize evacuation of critical patients.

triage.primary_complaint: Unattended package in the visitor lane with wires and a motor oil smell.
callback_questions: Are there any injuries or additional threats?

CALL-005.cad_brief:
INCIDENT SUMMARY  
Unattended package reported at Main Gate (Gate 1), Visitor Inspection Lane. Package is a taped cardboard box, approximately 2x2 feet, with wires protruding and a smell of motor oil. Area is being evacuated; traffic pushed back 100 meters. Caller is Corporal Bishop, gate sentry.

UNIT ASSIGNMENT RECOMMENDATION  
1 EOD team, 1 K-9 unit, 1 PMO unit.  

SCENE SAFETY BRIEF  
Maintain stand-off distance of 100 meters. Do not approach the package. Confirm area is fully evacuated and assess for any injuries or additional threats upon arrival.
